q-import { qt-object.qhtml } q-import { qt-property-animation.qhtml } q-component mycomp { q-property x: 100 div { text { comp1.x = 100 } } onxchanged(value) { var node = this.querySelector("div"); if (node) { node.textContent = "comp1.x = " + Math.round(Number(this.component.x)); } } } mycomp comp1 { } qt-property-animation anim1 { from: 100 to: 500 duration: 5000 running: true target: comp1 propertyName: "x" }
